metaTitle: The Atmosphere Global Documentation Hub - Downloads

header.title: Downloads
header.description: Access brand resources and relevant links.

sections.text: Figma design files and devlopment resources

items.text:
Atmosphere Foundations and Components Library

A Figma UI toolkit designers can use to get started creating digital products with Atmosphere's design system.

Atmosphere Icons Library

A Figma UI toolkit designers can use to change iconography inside the componentes of the Atmosphere’s design system.

Atmosphere Documentation Hub file

Content reference to populate the Doc Hub website.

GitLab: Global Assets Library

A framework-independent toolkit for any web-based product, with fonts, icons, global styles, and design tokens represented in multiple formats.

GitLab: Global Angular Library

The first framework-specific library, implementing Atmosphere as an Angular Material theme and custom Angular components.

Storybook: Global Angular Library

The Global Angular Library publishes a Storybook containing interactive demos of each component.

Atmosphere Documentation Hub Code

Code reference to populate the Doc Hub website.

Content development toolkit

Find specific language and style guidance

Macintosh support

Find useful support information in the Boeing Macintosh Wiki
